diff: The current value of the Sky Savings Rate can be obtained by calling the `ssr()` function on the sUSDS contract located on the Ethereum Mainnet at `0xa3931d71877C0E7a3148CB7Eb4463524FEc27fbD`.
The `ssr()` function returns a per-second compounding rate in RAY precision (10^27). The equivalent annualized rate, compounded over a 365-day year (31,536,000 seconds), is given by the formula:
The result is a decimal rate (e.g., 0.0365 represents 3.65% per year).
summary: Document How To Query The Sky Savings Rate Current Value
description: Specifies the sUSDS contract address, the `ssr()` function, and the formula to convert the per-second rate into an annualized rate.
